template.name: suspense_resolve_bank_fee
template.description: Manually resolve an investigated orphaned Suspense balance identified as a bank service charge by debiting Bank Fees expense and crediting Suspense in the Economic ledger, with required investigation and approval metadata.

financial_statements_impact.description: Bank service charge recognized: bank fees expense increases by the allocated fee amount.
Suspense asset is credited to clear the orphaned balance, decreasing the suspense asset position.

template.trigger: Operations analyst approves clearing an aged orphaned Suspense balance that has been investigated and identified as a bank fee.

ledger_scope_descriptions.economic: Economic on-balance-sheet ledger (Economic Ledger 5001) where reconciliation suspense and bank fee expense are recorded.

accounting_treatments.description: Recognize bank service charges as non-interest expense in the period identified during reconciliation and reclassify/clear the suspense holding balance accordingly.
Manual, approved reconciliation adjustment to resolve an orphaned suspense item by allocating it to the appropriate expense account.

account_code_validations.description: Bank Fees expense (partner bank service charges).
Reconciliation suspense / mixing bowl asset account (Master FBO - Suspense).

original_suspense_event_id.description: Event ID (UUID) of the original suspense-creating event being resolved.

anomaly_type.description: Classification of the suspense anomaly being resolved (must be BANK_FEE).

investigation_reference.description: Reference to the investigation ticket/document supporting this allocation (e.g., JIRA-12345).

approver.description: Identifier of the approving operations analyst (name or ID).

legs.description: Recognize the orphaned suspense balance as a bank service charge; clears suspense and records the expense.

examples.name: wire_fee_resolution_25_usd
examples.description: $25.00 wire transfer fee identified in suspense and approved by ops analyst; reclassified to Bank Fees expense and clears suspense.

examples.name: account_maintenance_fee_resolution_15_usd
examples.description: $15.00 monthly account maintenance fee identified in suspense and approved by ops analyst; reclassified to Bank Fees expense and clears suspense.
